tweets.text: You've been asking for this one... Now in preview: Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app. Start new work, review outputs, steer execution, and approve next steps, all from the ChatGPT mobile app. Codex keeps running on your laptop, Mac mini, or devbox.
You can now use Codex, wherever you have it running, from the ChatGPT app. Huge step forward for universal usage of agents.

New course: Transformers in Practice. A practical view of how transformer-based LLMs work, so you can reason about their behavior, diagnose problems like slow inference, and make smarter decisions about deployment. Built with AMD, taught by Sharon Zhou.

A small hack for my AI multi-taskers out there: I have so many Claude Code conversations running at once that I ask it to synthesize all of its actions or my next action into single go/no-go sentences.
